Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7400 "SHAMUSCASEII-0400-7400" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3e sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Shamus Case II.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0400 which performs a few steps to allow the game to run correctly:
1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. Copies a 12 byte string to the stack at $016D, some bytes of which are checked to allow the game to run (specifically $0174 = $32 and $0177 = $37) 3. Sets the Port B data direction register ($DD03) to $25 4. Sets the length of the file name or disk command at $B7 to $01
Note: the dump is also made from $0334 so as the capture the tape buffer in the state as left by the original loader, including 4 important bytes stored at $0398 which are needed for the game to run.
